executives.name: David Cote
executives.background: David Cote is the Executive Chairman of the Board of Vertiv. He is the former Chairman and CEO of Honeywell. He also served as a Class B Director to the Federal Reserve Bank of New York.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President, and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: James Bruno
executives.background: Mr. Bruno was appointed Senior Vice President - European Solutions and President of U. S. Steel Košice in 2018. He joined the company in 2014.
